name: Unnamed Project

entity_types.name: Researcher
entity_types.description: Individual conducting academic or industrial research, such as authors of GraphRAG papers or cont...

attributes.name: affiliation
attributes.description: Institution or organization the researcher is associated with.

entity_types.name: AcademicInstitution
entity_types.description: University or research institute involved in GraphRAG development or studies.

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Official name of the academic institution.

examples: The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen

entity_types.name: TechCompany
entity_types.description: Technology firm developing or applying GraphRAG, such as software companies or cloud providers.

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Official name of the technology company.

attributes.name: industry
attributes.description: Primary industry or sector of the company.

entity_types.name: MediaOutlet
entity_types.description: News organization or blog publishing content about GraphRAG, like CSDN or Sohu.

attributes.name: media_type
attributes.description: Type of media, e.g., blog, news website, social media platform.

entity_types.name: Developer
entity_types.description: Software engineer or programmer implementing GraphRAG in applications or contributing to open-sou...

attributes.name: expertise
attributes.description: Technical skills or areas of expertise.

entity_types.name: IndustryExpert
entity_types.description: Professional with specialized knowledge in fields applying GraphRAG, such as healthcare, finance,...

attributes.name: full_name
attributes.description: Full name of the industry expert.

examples: Medical professionals using GraphRAG for analysis

entity_types.name: Educator
entity_types.description: Teacher or academic instructor discussing or teaching GraphRAG concepts in educational settings.

entity_types.name: OpenSourceContributor
entity_types.description: Individual contributing to open-source GraphRAG projects on platforms like GitHub.

entity_types.name: Person
entity_types.description: Any individual not fitting into the above specific types, such as general users or commentators.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Any group or entity not covered by specific organizational types, such as small teams or informal...

attributes.name: purpose
attributes.description: General purpose or function of the organization.

edge_types.name: WORKS_FOR
edge_types.description: Employment or affiliation relationship between a person and an organization.

edge_types.name: COLLABORATES_WITH
edge_types.description: Cooperative relationship between individuals or organizations on projects or research.

edge_types.name: PUBLISHES_WITH
edge_types.description: Relationship where an individual or organization publishes content through a media outlet.

edge_types.name: DEVELOPS
edge_types.description: Relationship where an individual or organization creates or contributes to technology or software.

edge_types.name: APPLIES_IN
edge_types.description: Relationship where an individual or organization uses GraphRAG in a specific industry or field.

edge_types.name: TEACHES
edge_types.description: Educational relationship where an educator instructs others on GraphRAG topics.

edge_types.name: COMMENTS_ON
edge_types.description: Interaction where an individual provides feedback or opinions on content or developments.

edge_types.name: SUPPORTS
edge_types.description: Relationship where an individual or organization endorses or promotes GraphRAG technologies.

analysis_summary: 文本内容聚焦于GraphRAG技术的发展、应用和研究，涉及多个实体如研究人员、学术机构、科技公司、媒体等。设计实体类型时，提取了关键角色如Researcher、AcademicInstitution、TechCompany等，并确保所有类型均为可发声的现实主体。关系类型反映了社交媒体互动中的合作、发布、应用等联系，适合舆论模拟场景。
simulation_requirement: 未来GraphRAG的发展趋势是什么？有什么领域可以被快速推进的？
